headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Alphabet, Coinbase, GE, Quantumscape, Tesla And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The past week's bullish calls included the electric vehicle leader and a prominent IPO.
	Short sellers were behind some of the bearish calls seen during the week.

headline: Ark Funds Add More Coinbase, Offload Some Tesla
summary: Cathie Wood's Ark funds on Friday picked up more shares of Coinbase Global Inc (NASDAQ: COIN), which debuted this past week, while selling off some holdings of Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA).

headline: Will Dogecoin Reach $1 By 2022?
summary:
Every week, Benzinga conducts a survey to collect sentiment on what traders are most excited about, interested in or thinking about as they manage and build their personal portfolios.

This week we posed the following question to Benzinga visitors: Over the next year, will Dogecoin reach $1?

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech: Johnson & Johnson, Biogen Earnings, Neurology Conference And IPOs
summary: Biotech stocks reversed course in the week ended April 16, with the sector rebounding along with the broader market. The week's news flow was fairly light. The American Association of Cancer Research's annual meeting provided a platform for oncology-focused biopharma companies to present data from their clinical programs.

headline: NASA Awards Musk's SpaceX $2.9B For Starship Lunar Lander
summary: NASA has awarded SpaceX with a $2.89 billion contract to develop a commercial human lander that will safely carry the next two American astronauts to the moon.
